title: German Bratwurst with Sauerkraut Slaw
description: A classic German dish featuring grilled bratwurst served with a tangy sauerkraut slaw made with crunchy slaw and a hint of cider.
instructions: 1. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
2. Grill the bratwurst for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
3. Meanwhile, combine the sauerkraut, crunchy slaw, cider vinegar, and brown sugar in a bowl. Toss to combine.
4. Season the slaw with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Once the bratwurst is cooked, let it rest for a few minutes before slicing.
6. Serve the sliced bratwurst with the sauerkraut slaw on the side.
